author: Toto Tvalavadze
description: This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff. Record, view, and edit metrics in Obsidian in plain text / json files

manifest.author: Toto Tvalavadze
manifest.description: View, edit, and manage plaintext metric files.
manifest.name: Metrics

name: Metrics

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## Install

Once Metrics is approved in the Obsidian community directory, install it from **Settings > Community plugins**.

For a manual install, download the release assets and place them in:

```text
.obsidian/plugins/metrics-lens/
  manifest.json
  main.js
  styles.css
```

## Release assets

| Asset | Purpose |
| --- | --- |
| [manifest.json](https://github.com/totocaster/metrics-obsidian/releases/download/0.6.1/manifest.json) | Plugin metadata for Obsidian. |
| [main.js](https://github.com/totocaster/metrics-obsidian/releases/download/0.6.1/main.js) | Bundled plugin code. |
| [styles.css](https://github.com/totocaster/metrics-obsidian/releases/download/0.6.1/styles.css) | Scoped plugin styles. |

## Highlights

Metrics is a file-first Obsidian plugin for viewing and editing canonical `*.metrics.ndjson` files. Metrics files remain the source of truth; the plugin provides validation, filtering, grouping, summaries, charts, and record editing without adding a hidden database.

## Changelog

### Fixes

- fix: address Obsidian review feedback ([f0b42d8](https://github.com/totocaster/metrics-obsidian/commit/f0b42d80df7720f3ab64eda84ee573d1e54d4262))

**Full changelog**: https://github.com/totocaster/metrics-obsidian/compare/0.6.0...0.6.1
